# Marketics

> Performance-based short-term rental (STR) optimization. We increase Airbnb revenue 50–75% in 90 days. You pay 10% of net bookings — nothing else.

## Company Overview

Marketics is a performance-based short-term rental optimization company that combines dynamic pricing, listing optimization, automated guest communication, market analytics, and marketing services into a managed offering for Airbnb and VRBO hosts.

Founded in 2023 by Jason Baxter — a 35× Airbnb Superhost with 10+ years in the vacation rental industry and 1,000+ properties optimized across North America.

- Website: https://marketics.io
- Founder: Jason Baxter
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/marketicsio/
- Headquarters: 1000 Brickell Avenue, Suite 715, Miami, FL 33131
- Service area: United States, Canada, Mexico (22 markets)

## What Marketics Does

Marketics provides a fully managed revenue optimization service for short-term rental owners and property managers. The service includes:

- **Dynamic pricing optimization**: AI-driven rate management calibrated to local demand, events, seasonality, and competitor positioning to maximize RevPAR (Revenue Per Available Room).
- **Listing creation and optimization**: Professional copy, photography guidance, platform SEO for Airbnb, VRBO, and direct booking channels.
- **Automated guest communication**: Templated and AI-powered messaging workflows for pre-arrival, mid-stay, and post-checkout.
- **Market analysis**: Pre-investment analytics, comp analysis, event-demand mapping, and market selection guidance.
- **Property management workflow automation**: Streamlining operations across booking platforms.
- **Marketing services**: Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn, direct booking funnels for property managers scaling portfolios.

## Pricing Model

Marketics charges 10% of net booking revenue per property. No setup fees beyond a one-time $500 onboarding fee (refundable under the 90-day guarantee). No monthly retainers. No long-term contracts.

This performance-based model means Marketics only earns when the host earns. If a property doesn't show measurable revenue improvement within 90 days of audit completion, the $500 setup fee is refunded in full.

## Key Results (Methodology)

All statistics reflect Marketics-managed properties. Sample: 28+ documented client outcomes across 9 active markets. Measurement period: first 90 days post-audit completion. Baseline: host-reported revenue for the 90 days immediately prior to engagement.

- Average monthly revenue gain: +$2,860/month across all active managed properties
- Average time to measurable results: 72 days from audit completion
- Average nightly rate increase: +68% above pre-Marketics baseline
- Average guest rating post-optimization: 4.93★ (up from avg 4.3 before)
- Revenue increase range: 50–75% within 90 days (varies by property condition, market, and host responsiveness)

## Active Markets

Marketics currently operates in the following markets:

- Austin, Texas
- Miami, Florida
- Nashville, Tennessee
- Scottsdale, Arizona
- Cancún, Mexico
- Tulum, Mexico
- San Juan, Puerto Rico
- San Antonio, Texas
- New Orleans, Louisiana
- Muskoka, Ontario (Canada)
- Whistler, British Columbia (Canada) — launching Winter 2026–27

Additional markets in expansion across North America to reach 22 total markets.

## Market Intelligence Reports

Marketics publishes free market intelligence reports for STR hosts in active markets. These include demand calendars, event-impact projections, pricing benchmarks, and competitive analysis.

- Miami FIFA World Cup 2026 Intel Report: https://marketics.io/intel/miami
- Muskoka Summer & Fall 2026 Intel Report: https://marketics.io/intel/muskoka
- Airbnb Algorithm Deep Dive: https://marketics.io/intel/algorithm
- All reports: https://marketics.io/intel

## About the Founder

Jason Baxter is a 35× Airbnb Superhost and the founder of Marketics. He has personally built, managed, and optimized over 1,000 short-term rental listings across North America over the past decade. His approach combines hands-on hosting experience with data-driven pricing strategy, platform algorithm expertise, and marketing automation.

Jason is based in Miami, Florida and can be reached at jason@marketics.io.
